rulings.Case Title: BETTY UTTERBACK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Regarding The Deposition Of Its Person Most Knowledgeablecustodian Of Records
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, April 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Campbell Soup Company¿s motion for protective order regarding the deposition of its person most knowledgeable/custodian of records is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant must produce a witness or witnesses for deposition to answer questions and produce documents regarding the time period 1963-70. The deposition must occur no later than May 4. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours And Companys Person Most Knowledgeable-Custodian Of Records And Production Of Documents And Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, April 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the further deposition of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours and Co.¿s person most knowledgeable-custodian of records is continued to May 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
